info.title: Narrator AI Web Backend
info.description: Hard-price pricing and wallet lifecycle API for narrator-ai-web-backend.

get.summary: Health check
Database-backed readiness check

200.description: Database and wallet schema are ready

get.summary: Prometheus metrics

post.summary: Query one current hard price

get.summary: Query all current hard prices for a template
Read effective tier list for a template (hard-price v2, regression coverage)
get.description: Resolves the v2 catalog tier list per `docs/pricing/v2/catalog-tier-contract.md` §3-§6. Returns template-level entries verbatim, family-level entries scaled by the template's `tier_multiplier` per `rounding_rule_version`. Returns 404 `CATALOG_TIER_MISSING` if neither scope has any tier for this template.

200.description: Effective tier list for the template (template-level rows verbatim, family-level rows scaled by `tier_multiplier` per `rounding_rule_version`). Family-inherited Pro tiers carry `pro_surcharge_display` re-derived from the effective Pro − Flash diff for response consistency.

tier_multiplier.description: Decimal serialized as string to avoid JSON float drift.

404.description: No catalog entry exists for this template after family fallback (`CATALOG_TIER_MISSING`).

422.description: Family-level inheritance produced a Pro/Flash pair that no longer satisfies the surcharge invariant after multiplier rounding (`CATALOG_INHERITED_INVARIANT_VIOLATION`). Distinct from the upsert-side `CATALOG_PRO_SURCHARGE_MISMATCH` so admin tooling can differentiate operator-typed errors from inheritance-rounding drift.

503.description: The catalog persistence backend is temporarily unavailable (`CATALOG_PERSISTENCE_ERROR`). Retryable. Internal class names and DB error details are intentionally redacted; consult app logs for diagnosis.

details.description: Always empty for this endpoint — diagnostic detail is server-side only.

put.summary: Batch upsert tier entries for a template (hard-price v2 admin, regression coverage)
put.description: Atomic batch upsert of one or more tier rows for `template_id`. All submitted tiers persist or none — Pro<Flash, surcharge invariant, axis pairing, and rounding-rule whitelist all validated as a set against the merged (submitted ∪ existing-latest-enabled) view. Each successful tier gets `effective_version = max(existing for that tier) + 1` and a server-computed `manual_override_warning`. `updated_by` is resolved server-side from `X-Web-App-Key` → `users.id`.

200.description: All submitted tiers written; freshly-inserted rows returned with assigned `effective_version`, computed `manual_override_warning`, and resolved `updated_by`.

422.description: Catalog invariant violation. `code` is one of `CATALOG_PRO_BELOW_FLASH`, `CATALOG_PRO_SURCHARGE_MISMATCH`, `CATALOG_ROUNDING_VERSION_UNKNOWN`, `CATALOG_FLASH_PRO_AXIS_VIOLATION`, or generic `CATALOG_VALIDATION_ERROR` for structural payload issues. `details` carries the relevant tier_code + violated values.

get.summary: All tier versions for a template, including disabled rows (hard-price v2 admin audit, regression coverage)
get.description: Returns every `pricing_catalog_v2_entry` row for `template_id` grouped by `tier_code` and ordered newest-first by `effective_version`. Includes disabled rows so the admin UX can render the full audit trail per requirement.

200.description: History grouped by tier_code, newest version first.

post.summary: Compute realtime estimated points for a custom-template SRT (product requirement Plan ③/④)
Pin a server-approved hard-price quote
Freeze the pinned quote amount
Confirm a frozen wallet transaction
Refund a frozen wallet transaction
Credit a confirmed hard-price overbill

get.summary: Finance per-account wallet quota board
Query a wallet transaction by id
Query a wallet transaction by order
Query a wallet transaction by idempotency key
List baokuan templates with v2 catalog tiers (HP-XX)
get.description: Proxies upstream /v2/res/movie-baokuan and augments each returned item with complete v2 catalog tiers from pricing_template_v2 + pricing_catalog_v2_entry. Join key: upstream item.code such as xy0046 maps to template_id 46. Items without a complete 5-tier catalog are omitted.

parameters.name: platform_id
parameters.description: Filter by platform (1=快手, 2=抖音, 3=油管, 4=TikTok)

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: Filter by category id (1..9 per upstream dict)

200.description: Upstream payload forwarded; success data.items[] contains only items with complete v2 catalog tiers.

401.description: Authentication failed. One of: Bearer missing/invalid (UNAUTHORIZED); X-Web-App-Key missing/empty (WEB_APP_KEY_MISSING); X-Web-App-Key format invalid — must match `grid_<22 base62>` (WEB_APP_KEY_INVALID); X-Web-App-Key well-formed but not present in the `users` table (WEB_APP_KEY_UNKNOWN).

502.description: Upstream returned a non-success HTTP status, unparseable body, a malformed success payload, or a response larger than MAX_UPSTREAM_BYTES (UPSTREAM_HTTP_ERROR / UPSTREAM_UNREACHABLE / UPSTREAM_DECODE_ERROR / UPSTREAM_SCHEMA_ERROR / UPSTREAM_RESPONSE_TOO_LARGE).

503.description: Pricing BFF token not configured (PRICING_BFF_NOT_CONFIGURED), upstream not configured (UPSTREAM_NOT_CONFIGURED), local DB unavailable, upstream 5xx (UPSTREAM_HTTP_ERROR), or users-table lookup raised an exception (USER_LOOKUP_FAILED, retryable).

504.description: Upstream movie-baokuan did not respond in time (UPSTREAM_TIMEOUT).

get.summary: Get the current end-user's profile + balance
get.description: Returns the row in `users` keyed by the supplied `X-Web-App-Key`. Source-of-truth for end-user identity and balance — replaces the legacy `narrator-ai-web` direct-to-upstream `/api/account/balance` path in the reseller architecture. `mobile` is masked at the API boundary (first 3 + middle `*` + last 3); the raw value never leaves backend. Nullable fields render as JSON `null`, not omitted, not `""`.

user_id.description: users.id (UNIQUE auto-increment, surfaced as user_id in the API)

balance.description: users.balance_points as a 2-decimal string (e.g. "2340.02"); string-typed to dodge JSON float rounding.

401.description: X-Web-App-Key missing / malformed / unknown (WEB_APP_KEY_MISSING / WEB_APP_KEY_INVALID / WEB_APP_KEY_UNKNOWN).

get.summary: List narrator types
get.description: Thin wrapper around upstream `GET /v1/task/get_narrator_types`. Upstream payload is forwarded verbatim. Backend's master `OPEN_FASTAPI_APP_KEY` authenticates upstream — the caller's `X-Web-App-Key` is only used for end-user identity + reseller `users` table check.

get.summary: List v1 narrator types
get.description: Thin wrapper around upstream `GET /v1/narrator/types`. Upstream payload forwarded verbatim.

get.summary: List v1 narrator models
get.description: Thin wrapper around upstream `GET /v1/narrator/models`. Upstream payload forwarded verbatim.

get.summary: List narrator model versions
get.description: Thin wrapper around upstream `GET /v1/task/get_model_versions`. Upstream payload forwarded verbatim.

get.summary: List v1 narrator BGM
get.description: Thin wrapper around upstream `GET /v1/narrator/bgm`. Upstream payload forwarded verbatim.

get.summary: List v2 movie BGM
get.description: Thin wrapper around upstream `GET /v2/res/movie-bgm`. Upstream payload forwarded verbatim.

get.summary: List v2 movie dubbing voices
get.description: Thin wrapper around upstream `GET /v2/res/movie-dubbing`. Upstream payload forwarded verbatim.

get.summary: Get baokuan template platform/category metadata
get.description: Thin wrapper around upstream `GET /v2/res/baokuan/meta`. Upstream payload forwarded verbatim. Used by the web-side template page to populate the platform / category dropdowns.

post.summary: Create a presigned upload URL for Web personal cloud-drive
post.description: Checks Web-user quota, reserves the requested file_size against `users.cloud_drive_quota_bytes`, calls internal cloud-drive `POST /v2/files/upload/presigned-url`, then maps the returned file_id to the authenticated Web user.

post.summary: Confirm a direct upload and complete ownership mapping
post.description: For successful local uploads, forwards callback to internal cloud-drive and marks the reserved Web file completed. Local SRT uploads must include a sha256 value via `srt_file_hash`, `sha256`, or `file_sha256`. Failed callbacks release reserved quota.

post.summary: Create a presigned download URL for an owned file
post.description: Verifies that the requested file_id belongs to the authenticated Web user before calling internal cloud-drive `POST /v2/files/download/presigned-url`.

get.summary: List authenticated user's personal cloud-drive files
get.description: Returns local tenant-scoped file rows. Cross-user files are never listed.

delete.summary: Delete an owned personal cloud-drive file
delete.description: Checks tenant ownership before forwarding delete to internal cloud-drive. Missing and cross-tenant file_ids both return 404.

get.summary: Get authenticated user's personal cloud-drive storage usage
get.description: Computes usage from local `user_cloud_files` rather than internal cloud-drive master-account totals.

post.summary: Create a transfer upload task
post.description: Creates an internal cloud-drive transfer task for the authenticated Web user. If file_size is provided, quota is checked before the upstream call; otherwise the transfer is created as size-unknown pending and quota is enforced when upstream metadata returns a real size. Transfer-link hash may be empty in v1.

get.summary: List authenticated user's transfer records
get.description: Refreshes owned transfer status/progress from internal cloud-drive `GET /v2/files/user/filelist`, persists current local lifecycle state, then returns tenant-scoped transfer records.

post.summary: Batch-delete owned cloud-drive files
Batch-delete owned transfer files
Create subtitle extraction task (group G, regression coverage)
post.description: Proxies `POST /v2/task/ocr_extraction/create` to upstream using the caller's `X-Web-App-Key` as `app-key`.

get.summary: Query subtitle extraction task status (group G, regression coverage)
get.description: Proxies `GET /v2/task/ocr_extraction/query/{task_id}` to upstream.

get.description: Proxies `GET /v2/task/subtitle_removal/query/{task_id}` to upstream.

get.description: Proxies `GET /v2/task/commentary/search_media_information` with a 90-second upstream timeout (upstream search is slow).

get.summary: List movie material library (group E, regression coverage)
get.description: Proxies `GET /v2/res/movie-sucai` to upstream.

Create popular-learning task (group B, regression coverage)
Create subsync task (group B, regression coverage)
Create generate-writing task (group B, regression coverage)
Create clip-data task (group B, regression coverage)
Create fast-writing task (group B, regression coverage)
Create fast-writing clip-data task (group B, regression coverage)
Create video-composing task (group B, regression coverage)
Generate a hard-price v2 quote
post.description: Computes and persists a quote per `docs/pricing/v2/quote-snapshot-contract.md` §3-§5. Wallet preflight (§5) returns 402 `WALLET_INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE`. Quote stays valid until `expires_at` (default 5min TTL, controlled by `QUOTE_TTL_SECONDS`).

404.description: No catalog entry for the requested template (CATALOG_TIER_MISSING).

422.description: Validation failure: QUOTE_COMBO_KEY_INVALID, CUSTOM_SRT_HASH_MISSING, or QUOTE_VALIDATION_ERROR.

post.summary: Create or upsert a master task
post.description: Persist a narrator master task scoped to the caller (`X-Web-App-Key` → `users.id`). If the body carries a `narrator_task_id`, the row is upserted (preserves the original ID + `created_at`; rejects cross-tenant overwrite with 403). If the body has no `narrator_task_id`, the server assigns one and returns the row with server-stamped `created_at` / `updated_at`.

200.description: Task created (no narrator_task_id supplied) or upserted (same-tenant).

400.description: Body is not a JSON object (BAD_REQUEST).

401.description: X-Web-App-Key missing / malformed / unknown (WEB_APP_KEY_MISSING / WEB_APP_KEY_INVALID / WEB_APP_KEY_UNKNOWN).

403.description: narrator_task_id in body already exists but belongs to another user (FORBIDDEN). No silent overwrite.

503.description: Narrator tasks store temporarily unavailable (NARRATOR_TASKS_DB_UNAVAILABLE, retryable).

get.summary: List the caller's master tasks (paginated)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional status filter (e.g. pending / running / completed).

200.description: Page of tasks owned by the caller, ordered by updated_at DESC.

400.description: Invalid pagination params (BAD_REQUEST): page < 1, limit not in [1, 9999], or non-integer values.

get.summary: Fetch a single master task scoped to the caller
get.description: Returns 404 for both missing rows and rows owned by another user — existence isn't leaked across the tenant boundary.

200.description: Task found and owned by the caller.

404.description: Task is missing OR belongs to another user (NOT_FOUND). Existence is intentionally not distinguished from cross-tenant.

put.summary: Replace a master task body (optional CAS preconditions)
put.description: Replaces the row in full. With `expected_status` and/or `expected_step` query params, the write becomes a compare-and-set: if the row's current state doesn't satisfy the preconditions, returns 409 CAS_MISMATCH and does not write. `expected_status` may be a comma-separated list (e.g. `running,paused`); the precondition holds if the current status is in the list. Mirrors the `dbCasUpdate` semantics the web-side step orchestrator depends on.

parameters.name: expected_status
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of allowed current `status` values for the CAS precondition.

parameters.name: expected_step
parameters.description: Required current `current_step` value for the CAS precondition (in addition to expected_status if both are supplied).

200.description: Row updated. CAS preconditions (if any) matched.

400.description: Body is not a JSON object, or `narrator_task_id` in body conflicts with the URL path (BAD_REQUEST).

404.description: Task is missing OR belongs to another user (NOT_FOUND).

409.description: Row exists for this user but its current state does not satisfy the `expected_status` / `expected_step` preconditions (CAS_MISMATCH). The write was rejected; no state change.

pricingBearer.description: Pricing BFF token (PRICING_BFF_AUTH_TOKEN env var). **Server-side only** — must never be embedded in browser-visible code or client-bundle env (NEXT_PUBLIC_* / VITE_* etc.). The browser authenticates to Web with session/cookie; Web's SSR/API tier proxies to /pricing/movie-baokuan with this Bearer token. Distributing the token to browsers defeats the authorization boundary and lets any user consume upstream quota via the backend's server-side app-key.

webAppKey.name: X-Web-App-Key
webAppKey.description: Reseller end-user identity (`users.app_key`, format `grid_<22 base62>`, issued by `scripts/create_user.py`). Required on routes that consume upstream quota or affect end-user balance, so the BFF Bearer cannot be turned into a free pass for arbitrary internet callers. Forwarded by narrator-ai-web BFF from the incoming `x-app-key` request header. Routes requiring both `pricingBearer` AND `webAppKey` use a single security entry with both keys (AND semantics in OpenAPI 3).

NarratorMetadataUpstream.description: Upstream payload forwarded verbatim. Shape varies per upstream endpoint (some return `{code, data}`, others return bare arrays). Web tier already knows how to parse each route's upstream contract.

NarratorMetadataAuthFailure.description: Authentication failed. One of: Bearer missing/invalid (UNAUTHORIZED); X-Web-App-Key missing/empty (WEB_APP_KEY_MISSING); X-Web-App-Key format invalid (WEB_APP_KEY_INVALID); X-Web-App-Key not in users table (WEB_APP_KEY_UNKNOWN).

NarratorMetadataUpstreamFailure.description: Upstream returned non-2xx HTTP, unreachable, non-JSON body, or response exceeded MAX_UPSTREAM_BYTES (UPSTREAM_HTTP_ERROR / UPSTREAM_UNREACHABLE / UPSTREAM_DECODE_ERROR / UPSTREAM_RESPONSE_TOO_LARGE).

NarratorMetadataServiceUnavailable.description: Pricing BFF token not configured (PRICING_BFF_NOT_CONFIGURED), upstream not configured (UPSTREAM_NOT_CONFIGURED), upstream 5xx (UPSTREAM_HTTP_ERROR, retryable), or users-table lookup raised (USER_LOOKUP_FAILED, retryable).

NarratorMetadataUpstreamTimeout.description: Upstream did not respond in time (UPSTREAM_TIMEOUT, retryable).

CloudDriveError.description: Cloud-drive error envelope. Common codes include UNAUTHORIZED, WEB_APP_KEY_MISSING, WEB_APP_KEY_INVALID, WEB_APP_KEY_UNKNOWN, BAD_REQUEST, CLOUD_DRIVE_QUOTA_EXCEEDED, NOT_FOUND, UPSTREAM_* and CLOUD_DRIVE_DB_UNAVAILABLE.

srt_file_hash.description: 64-character sha256 hex. Required for successful local .srt uploads.

file_size.description: Optional pre-known file size. Omit for Baidu Netdisk/share links where Web cannot know the size before backend/upstream metadata resolution.

file_name.description: Optional display name used before upstream transfer metadata is returned.

srt_payload.description: Raw SRT content. Either srt_payload or srt_metrics must be provided; srt_metrics takes precedence.

legacy_consume_budget_evidence.description: Optional same-order legacy consume_budget evidence. When present, wallet confirm returns 409 WALLET_DOUBLE_BILLING_GUARD and leaves the hard-price transaction frozen.

MovieBaokuanResponse.description: 200 response is either a success envelope (code=10000 with data.total/items) or an upstream business-error pass-through (code != 10000 with data as null or any upstream shape). Consumers MUST branch on `code === 10000` before reading `data.items`.

MovieBaokuanSuccess.description: Upstream success: code=10000, with items filtered to templates that have complete v2 catalog tiers.

MovieBaokuanUpstreamError.description: Upstream business error (code != 10000) forwarded as-is. `data` is typically null but may be any shape — consumers MUST NOT assume `data.items` exists.

data.description: Typically null. Schema not constrained — upstream-defined.

MovieBaokuanItem.description: Upstream item shape pass-through, with v2 catalog tiers appended by the backend. Items lacking a complete 5-tier v2 catalog are omitted from success responses.

code.description: External xy-code (for example, xy0001). Join key maps xy0001 -> pricing_template_v2.template_id 1. NULL/custom placeholders are omitted from success items.

pricing_rule_version.description: backend-augmented compatibility field sourced from rounding_rule_version. If future tier rows disagree, this is an array of versions; clients should prefer tiers[...].pricing_rule_version.

tiers.description: Complete 5-tier v2 catalog map keyed by tier_code. All five keys are present for every returned item.

NarratorTaskBody.description: The full master-task object as defined on the web side (NarratorMasterTask in src/lib/master-task-types.ts). The backend persists it verbatim as a JSONB blob — schema is not enforced at the API boundary so the web-side type can evolve without alembic churn. `narrator_task_id` is optional on POST (server-assigned when absent) and must equal the URL path on PUT. `quote_id` is an OPTIONAL POST-only field — when present, the backend commits the bound `pricing_quotes_v2` row into a `pricing_snapshots_v2` snapshot and stamps `narrator_tasks.snapshot_id`. The body must NOT carry `total`, `breakdown`, or `final_charge_price` (rejected as QUOTE_BODY_PRICE_FORBIDDEN); the server trusts only the quote.

app_key.description: Ignored if present — the server overwrites with the authenticated `X-Web-App-Key` to prevent client-side tenant spoofing.

quote_id.description: Optional POST-only. Binds this master task to a previously generated `pricing_quotes_v2` row. Server commits a snapshot and returns `snapshot_id` in the response.

snapshot_id.description: Present iff the POST body carried a `quote_id` and the snapshot was committed.

PricingQuoteRequest.description: Request payload for POST /pricing/quote. Exactly one of `template_id` / `custom_template_id` must be set. For `custom_template_id`, both `custom_srt_file_hash` and `custom_srt_valid_line_count` are required.

combo_key.description: Must end with `_pro` when `pro_upgrade=true`; must not end with `_pro` when `pro_upgrade=false`.

MovieBaokuanTier.description: One v2 catalog tier. manual_price is the user-facing price; system_reference_price is returned for internal/admin reference and must not be displayed on C-end UI.

system_reference_price.description: Internal/admin reference price in web_point; returned by API but hidden from C-end UI.

raw_rate.description: Decimal serialized as string by Flask JSON provider.

final_rate.description: Decimal serialized as string by Flask JSON provider.
